title: AgentCamp 2026 - Brisbane Edition: Where Developers and Agents meet!
abstract:
After the resounding success of AgentCon-Brisbane, Global AI Community proudly brings you : AGENTCAMP 2026, a flagship, in-person full day event exclusively for Developers, coders and AI enthusiasts :)

Have you been waiting to get your hands on some working Agents?
Curious about real working Multi-Agent systems?

Then Welcome, to AgentCamp 2026 - Brisbane; the global initiative where AI enthusiasts and developers come together to learn, share, and grow their AI knowledge!
This will be a full day in-person hosted event with Hands-on labs, workshops and community expert led sessions on Agents, Agentic frameworks, Building secure AI systems, Graph RAG, Agent Identity and Evaluation frameworks and more.
For AI nerds and hands-on developers, we also plan to have a fun Snake Bot Hack Tournament!
All participants will be provided with Azure Credentials to hack and code live in the workshops and hackathon
So power up your laptops, choose your favorite LLM IDE and Agentic frameworks and get READY to Camp at AgentCamp - Brisbane!

The Agenda is as follows:

1. Keynote : The future of AI agents (15 minutes)
2. 45 minute breakout session : Build and launch AI agents fast with Microsoft Foundry and the AI Toolkit
3. Three hands-on workshops/labs: 90 minutes each
4. Snake Bot Hack Tournament : 1-2 hour competitive bot-coding competition
5. Lightning talks and connect with Industry Experts, SMEs
6. Breakfast, lunch and tea breaks with networking
7. SME connect roundtables
